summary: Removed the confusing top-level src/infrastructure layer and moved former infrastructure concepts into the domain/application/adapters source model without changing product behavior.

source: User approval to proceed with domain/application/adapters split after discussion about removing infrastructure layer confusion.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Top-level src/infrastructure does not exist; former gateway/graph/knowledge/local helpers moved under application while Pi/web adapters remain separate.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs asserts domain/application/adapters top-level layers, absence of src/infrastructure, and application gateway/graph rebuilder paths.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Architecture, type, feature, smoke, and package checks pass.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: npm run typecheck, npm run check:architecture, npm run test:features, npm run test:smoke, npm run test:pack, and npm test all passed.

test_design_evidence: TASK-076 feature test covers root src layout, no extensions/codewiki wrapper, no top-level infrastructure layer, and application gateway/graph rebuilder paths.
code_change_evidence: Moved src/infrastructure/gateway.ts and transaction.ts to src/application/gateway/.
Moved filesystem, file-store, git-cache, rebuild-runner, and status-dock-prefs helpers to src/application/local/.
Updated imports, architecture guardrails, README, KB docs, and TASK-076 trace coverage.
builder_notes: codewiki_build failed in the current interactive process because the loaded CodeWiki extension still has pre-edit module paths cached; reload is needed before using codewiki_* tools against the new tree. This build was written manually to preserve implementation evidence.
risks: Further port extraction could move application/local implementations behind injected ports later; this pass preserves behavior and dependency direction while removing the top-level infrastructure layer.

closure_brief.user_intent: Remove the confusing top-level infrastructure source layer while keeping adapters separate as the external-facing shell.
implemented_changes: Moved former infrastructure files into application/gateway, application/graph, application/knowledge, and application/local.
Kept Pi and web adapters under src/adapters.
Updated import paths, docs, architecture guardrails, and TASK-076 tests.
acceptance_evidence: find src shows no src/infrastructure directory.
Package dry-run tarball includes src/application/gateway, src/application/graph, src/application/knowledge, src/application/local, and src/adapters.
non_goals_preserved: No new CodeWiki product behavior added.
No publish, push, or release performed.
remaining_risks: Independent validation still required before closing TASK-076.
